chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1078 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 5561/2025 3. For hearing of main case 24.03.2025 Mr. Jawaid Farooqui, advocate for the petitioner Syed Irshad-ur-Rehman advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent which is taken on record, whereas, Mr. Ameer Bux Metlo advocate undertakes to file Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent.. Mr. Mumtaz Ali Bohio, Commissioner Zone-VI, CTO, Karachi is present in person and states that the department will facilitate the online filing of applications whereafter same shall be decided in accordance with law. Learned counsel states that the same shall be facilitated expeditiously. In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition has served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. The presence and assistance of learned Commissioner is noted and appreciated. Judge Judge Amjad
